name: Hostex MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Hostex — a property management system (PMS) for vacation rentals. Enables AI agents to manage Hostex vacation rental properties, reservations, availability calendars, and listings — automating property management workflows for short-term rental operators.
use_cases: Managing vacation rental reservations and availability from property management agents
Updating property listings and pricing from automation agents
Monitoring booking status and guest communications from hospitality agents
Automating routine Hostex property management tasks from AI assistant workflows
not_for: Teams not using Hostex PMS (property management system-specific)
Long-term rental management (Hostex focuses on short-term/vacation rentals)
Airbnb/Vrbo direct platform management (Hostex is the PMS layer)
best_when: A short-term rental operator using Hostex as their PMS wants AI agents to help manage reservations, availability, and property operations — reducing manual portal work.
avoid_when: You don't use Hostex. Lodgify, Guesty, Hospitable, and other PMS platforms have their own integrations. This is Hostex-specific.

auth.notes: Hostex API key authentication. Requires active Hostex account with API access enabled.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free MCP server; Hostex subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: None for MCP server; Hostex plans apply
pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. Hostex subscription costs apply separately.

known_agent_gotchas: Reservation management affects real bookings — test carefully before autonomous agent use
Availability changes affect guest-facing booking calendars — validate before applying
Community implementation — not an official Hostex MCP server
Niche audience: only relevant for Hostex PMS users
Guest PII (personal information) may be accessible via reservations — handle with care
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Property reservation data includes guest PII. Handle booking data carefully. API key must be secured. Real reservation changes affect live bookings.

security_score_components.security_notes: Guest PII in reservations. API key security. Real booking changes require careful validation.
